records.question: Join all the records from table race with table track on Track_ID
records.gold_sql: SELECT * FROM `race` AS T1 JOIN `track` AS T2 ON T1.`Track_ID` = T2.`Track_ID`

records.question: List the Name which summation of Year_Opened is at most 1975.78 in table track
records.gold_sql: SELECT `Name` FROM `track` GROUP BY `Name` HAVING SUM(`Year_Opened`) <= 1975.78
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Name
FROM track
GROUP BY Name
HAVING SUM(Year_Opened) <= 1975.78

records.question: List all the Name and Name from the table race and the table track where Track_ID is the same

records.pred_sql: SELECT race."Name", track."Name" FROM race JOIN track ON race."Track_ID" = track."Track_ID"
